compiled_state.title: [2fbd-f6b8] UPDATE: Update docs/reference/system-landscape.md plugin distribution boundary section
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What to do
Update docs/reference/system-landscape.md to reflect that plugins/dso/ is the local install path only and plugin files must use _PLUGIN_ROOT for portability.

## Edits required

### Plugin Distribution Boundary section:
- Document that `plugins/dso/` is the local dev install path; host projects may install at any path
- Document that distributed plugin files (scripts, hooks, skills, agents) MUST use `_PLUGIN_ROOT` to reference sibling files
- Document that markdown files use `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/` prefix for runtime agent references
- Note the enforcement hook: `.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh`

## Files to modify
- docs/reference/system-landscape.md

## testing_mode: UPDATE
